nodes.label: Lightweight skill metadata utilities shared by prompt_builder and skills_tool.
True if *path* should be skipped by active skill scanners.      Use this on ever
True if *path* is under a support dir of an actual skill root.      ``references
Parse YAML with lazy import and CSafeLoader preference.
Parse YAML frontmatter from a markdown string.      Uses yaml with CSafeLoader f
Return True when the skill is compatible with the current OS.      Skills declar
Return True when the named runtime environment is currently active.      Cached
Return True when the skill is relevant to the current runtime environment.
Test hook — drop the shared raw config cache.
Read config.yaml with a shared mtime+size keyed cache.      This module intentio
Read disabled skill names from config.yaml.      Args:         platform: Explici
Test hook — drop the in-process cache.
Read ``skills.external_dirs`` from config.yaml and return validated paths.
Return all skill directories: local ``~/.hermes/skills/`` first, then external.
Return True when ``path`` lives under a configured external skills dir.      ``s
Extract conditional activation fields from parsed frontmatter.
Extract config variable declarations from parsed frontmatter.      Skills declar
Scan all enabled skills and collect their config variable declarations.      Wal
Walk a nested dict following a dotted key.  Returns None if any part is missing.
Resolve current values for skill config vars from config.yaml.      Skill config
Extract a truncated description from parsed frontmatter.
Walk skills_dir yielding sorted paths matching *filename*.      Excludes Hermes
Check whether *candidate* is a valid namespace (``[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+``).
